result: The R script has been successfully executed. The cleaned data file has been written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv containing exactly 5 variables (NSID, educma, educpa, educdtlma, educdtlpa) with 16,111 rows. The parental education variables have been consolidated across waves, collapsed to NVQ-equivalent schemes, converted to labeled factor variables, and output as a single CSV file ready for analysis.
